rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[5rem] font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#141517]
rules.overline: text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#7A2D2A]

spacing_and_layout.hero_layout: Asymmetric layout: Left side takes col-span-1 to col-span-7 with massive typography. Right side takes col-span-8 to col-span-12 with an offset portrait layered over an abstract texture.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Used in About/Stats section. Mix of col-span-4 and col-span-8 to break symmetry.
spacing_and_layout.gallery_layout: Masonry-style or alternating image widths. Generous gap (gap-12 or gap-16) to let each case study breathe like an editorial spread.

components.navigation: Sticky header (z-50) using glassmorphism: `backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80`. Must have logo, 3-5 links, and primary CTA (Contact).
components.buttons: Primary: Solid bg-[#7A2D2A] text-white with sharp or minimal rounded-sm corners. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#141517] text-[#141517]. All buttons must have smooth hover transitions (e.g., hover:bg-[#61221F] for primary).
components.filter_chips: Minimalist underline style (border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-[#7A2D2A]) or very thin bordered pills (border border-[#E5E1D8] text-sm). Not standard solid primary color chips.
components.cards: Case Study Cards: No visible borders or shadows. Image dominant, title below with clean typography and subtle arrow icon appearing on hover. Sharp edges.
components.modal_dialog: Case study details open in a Shadcn Dialog. Must be styled as a large, elegant side-sheet or full-screen overlay (bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md) with generous padding (p-8 md:p-16) to feel like a high-end article.
components.contact_form: Shadcn Form/Input components. Inputs should have `border-b` only (no full box border) or very clean, flat boxes (`bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#E5E1D8]`). Add success message toast upon submission.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Smooth scrolling via Lenis is MANDATORY to give it a premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use Framer Motion for subtle fade-in-up entrance animations for text and images as they scroll into view.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) within a hidden overflow container. Links use an animated underline effect.

visual_enhancers.texture: Apply a subtle SVG noise/grain overlay (opacity-5) across the entire body to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.lines: Use delicate 1px lines (`border-[#E5E1D8]`) to separate sections or grid items, emphasizing structure without weight.

hero_texture.description: Minimalist abstract architecture texture (gray/white lines) - use as a subtle background behind the hero portrait or section.

portraits.description: Confident male professional standing beside a wall. Use as the main portrait for Alex Morgan in the Hero or About section.
Woman in gray jacket for testimonial section.
Man with beard and glasses for testimonial section.

case_studies.description: Collaborative office meeting. Use for 'Strategic Partnerships' or 'Team Leadership' case study.
Three professionals discussing documents. Use for 'Enterprise Sales' or 'Market Expansion' case study.
Two men using a computer. Use for 'GTM Strategy' case study.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, category chips) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., `data-testid='filter-gtm-chip'`, `data-testid='download-cv-button'`).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure the oxblood accent (#7A2D2A) has sufficient contrast against the alabaster background (#FDFBF7). Inputs and labels must maintain a 4.5:1 ratio.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid default Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif fonts for headings. Implement Cormorant Garamond for all H1/H2/H3 tags, and Manrope for body text.
Do not use generic Shadcn Card components with their default borders and shadows. Use custom clean layouts (sharp edges, no shadow) for gallery items to maintain the editorial look.
Ensure the hero section uses an asymmetric layout and relies on negative space rather than filling every corner.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main layout wrapper.
Case study details must open in a Shadcn Dialog that is heavily styled to look like an editorial sheet (large, clean, whitespace-heavy) rather than a standard system modal.
Form inputs should follow a minimalist, high-end approach (e.g., bottom borders only, or very subtle full borders without focus rings).
CV download button should use a placeholder route (e.g., '#' or '/resume.pdf') but function visually as a prominent CTA.
